title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 15–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Big Mom, Unknown person #14, Zoro as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mamahahahaha! Shame. Well, then. Do me a favor and remove these already.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whaddaya mean "already"?! You're crazy, you old Hag!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just hearing her talk turns my blood to ice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Queen... How do you have the guts to call her an old HAG?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hear big mom and Lord Kaido were once crewmates. A long time ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Take 'em off already. Hurry up.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lord Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: KAIDO...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Big Mom. You've finally showed up, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi... I told you. Take these off, boy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No, you, er, you must be juki-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Take them off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WAHA-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ahhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How many decades has it been?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Napo- Leon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm so glad you're back to normal!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Yes, mama!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A sword came out of her hat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a bit shy, so I didn't know whether to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And it's freakin' talking!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told you. If you came here, I'd kill ya.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And you think I'll let you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: extraordinary events!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Get us out of

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Onigashi- MAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 28 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
